strengths: Extensive fullstack experience across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js, PostgreSQL alternatives)
Strong background in scalable architectures, microservices, and high-performance systems (e.g., re:cinq, Dunnhumby)
Proven track record of open-source contributions, mentorship, and pragmatic problem-solving (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role with 10+ years of senior-level experience
Limited direct exposure to PostgreSQL and Kubernetes in recent roles (focused on MongoDB, AWS, Dlang)
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with candidate's Berlin-based remote work history
response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional fullstack depth and architectural rigor, with TypeScript proficiency and scalable systems experience that aligns well with the role. However, his senior-level background may overshoot the target seniority, and his recent stack diverges from PostgreSQL/Kubernetes. Remote work history and relocation may also pose minor concerns.
